home.hero.subtitle: Premium at-home car wash and detailing across Jakarta and surrounding areas. We keep working until you're satisfied.
home.problems.title: You worked hard for your car. Here's what happens when the wrong person washes it.
home.problems.subtitle: Cheap washes cut corners. The damage adds up fast, and it's expensive to fix.
home.problems.swirlMarks.title: Swirl Marks & Scratches
home.problems.swirlMarks.body: Dirty rags and single-bucket washes grind dirt into your paint. Those circular scratches you see in sunlight? That's permanent damage from improper technique.
home.problems.fadedPaint.title: Faded & Oxidised Paint
home.problems.fadedPaint.body: Harsh chemicals and cheap detergents strip your car's protective clear coat. Over time, your paint fades, oxidises, and loses its depth and gloss.
home.problems.waterSpots.title: Water Spot Etching
home.problems.waterSpots.body: Hard water left to dry on your paint bonds with the surface and etches into the clear coat. Once it's baked in by the sun, it's nearly impossible to remove without polishing.
home.problems.crackedInterior.title: Cracked Interior Surfaces
home.problems.crackedInterior.body: Generic cleaners dry out leather, vinyl, and rubber. Dashboard cracks, seats fade, and trim pieces deteriorate years before they should.
home.problems.brakeDust.title: Brake Dust Corrosion
home.problems.brakeDust.body: Neglected wheels accumulate brake dust that bonds with the rim surface. Left untreated, it causes permanent pitting and corrosion that no amount of cleaning can fix.
home.problems.resaleValue.title: Reduced Resale Value
home.problems.resaleValue.body: Swirl marks, faded paint, cracked interiors, and corroded rims all add up. A poorly maintained car can lose millions in resale value compared to one that's been properly cared for.
home.whyCastudio.title: We do things the right way, every single time.
home.whyCastudio.quote: "We're for the car owner who values their time and their vehicle, and refuses to settle for anything less than the best."
home.whyCastudio.body: We use the proper techniques, the right products, and trained technicians who care about your car as much as you do. Every wash follows a systematic process designed to clean thoroughly without causing damage.
home.whyCastudio.premiumProductsDesc: Top-quality shampoos, sealants, and coatings only.
home.whyCastudio.correctEquipmentDesc: Two-bucket method, grit guards, fresh microfiber every time.
home.whyCastudio.trainedTechniciansDesc: Uniformed and certified on proper wash technique.
home.whyCastudio.totalConvenienceDesc: We come to you. Home, office, or apartment.
home.services.title: Car Wash
home.services.subtitle: Every wash uses premium car shampoo, the two-bucket method, fresh microfiber towels, and top-quality products. Choose the depth of care your car needs.
home.services.standard.title: Standard Wash
home.services.standard.subtitle: The Thorough Clean
home.services.standard.body: Foam wash, interior clean, spot treatment, engine bay. The complete foundation wash with premium products and proper technique.
home.services.professional.title: Professional Wash
home.services.professional.subtitle: The Deep Restoration
home.services.professional.body: Everything in Standard plus glass spot remover and tar remover. For cars that need deeper cleaning and restoration.
home.services.elite.title: Elite Wash
home.services.elite.subtitle: The Full Transformation
home.services.elite.body: Everything in Professional plus clay bar decontamination and premium sealant coating. The ultimate treatment for cars that deserve the best.
home.detailing.title: Auto Detailing Services
home.detailing.interior.title: Interior Detailing
home.detailing.interior.body: Complete cabin restoration. Deep vacuum, upholstery extraction, leather conditioning, dashboard UV treatment, air vent detail, and odour neutralisation. Your interior will look and smell like new.
home.detailing.exterior.title: Exterior Detailing
home.detailing.exterior.body: Full paint correction and protection. Clay bar decontamination, machine polish to remove swirl marks, premium sealant coating for deep gloss and hydrophobic finish. Trim and rubber restoration included.
home.detailing.window.title: Window Detailing
home.detailing.window.body: Crystal-clear glass inside and out. Water scale and mineral deposit removal, film and haze cleaning, finished with a hydrophobic coating that repels rain for weeks.
home.detailing.tireRims.title: Tire & Rims Detailing
home.detailing.tireRims.body: Deep wheel restoration. Brake dust and iron fallout removal, tar and adhesive cleaning, rim polish, and tire sidewall dressing that protects and restores the deep black finish.
home.detailing.fullDetail.title: Full Detail Package
home.detailing.fullDetail.body: All four detailing services in one comprehensive 8-hour session. Interior, exterior, windows, and tires & rims. The complete restoration for cars that deserve the best.
home.subscriptions.title: Never think about car washing again.
home.subscriptions.body: Subscribe and we'll keep your car in showroom condition on a schedule that works for you. Regular washes prevent the buildup of dirt, grime, and contaminants that damage your paint over time. This saves you from expensive repairs down the road.
home.subscriptions.bullet1: Consistent care keeps your paint protected year-round
home.subscriptions.bullet2: Save vs. one-time pricing with every wash
home.subscriptions.bullet3: Flexible scheduling. You pick the days
home.subscriptions.bullet5: Your car always looks its best

about.hero.title: We Started Because Jakarta Deserves Better Car Care
about.hero.subtitle: We're car people. We know the frustration of sitting in Jakarta traffic for 45 minutes just to get a mediocre wash at a dirty roadside shop.
about.aboutUs.title: Premium car care, delivered to your door
about.aboutUs.quote: "We're for the car owner who values their time and their vehicle, and refuses to settle."
about.aboutUs.body1: Most street washes use dirty rags, harsh chemicals, and zero technique. The result? Swirl marks, scratches, and paint that ages faster than it should. Castudio exists because we believe there's a better way.
about.aboutUs.body2: We use premium car shampoo, the two-bucket method with grit guards, and fresh microfiber towels on every car. Our technicians are trained, uniformed, and equipped to deliver a premium wash at your home or office, everything included.
about.story.title: We know there's a better way
about.story.body1: We're car people. We know the frustration of sitting in Jakarta traffic for 45 minutes just to get a mediocre wash at a dirty roadside shop. We know the anxiety of handing your car to someone who uses the same rag on every vehicle. We know there's a better way.
about.story.body2: We bring premium car care to your doorstep. No cutting corners. No generic products. No rushed jobs. Every wash uses premium products, the proper two-bucket method, and dedicated microfiber for each section of your car. Our technicians are trained, uniformed, and held to a quality standard that most shops never reach.
about.story.body3: We're for the car owner who values their time and their vehicle, and refuses to settle for a street-level wash. If that sounds like you, welcome home.
about.story.quote: "We're for the car owner who values their time and their vehicle, and refuses to settle."
about.story.metric1.label: And surrounding areas
about.story.metric2.label: Per wash, never rushed
about.story.metric3.label: Certified technicians
about.story.metric4.label: Products only
about.differentiators.title: The standards we hold ourselves to
about.differentiators.1.title: Premium Products Only
about.differentiators.1.body: We use premium car shampoos, sealants, and coatings, never diluted bulk chemicals. Your car gets what it deserves.
about.differentiators.2.title: Correct Equipment
about.differentiators.2.body: We use the right tools and techniques for every job. Proper wash mitts, grit guards, and dedicated microfiber for each section of your car.
about.differentiators.3.title: Trained Technicians
about.differentiators.3.body: Our team is trained on proper wash technique, paint decontamination, and sealant application. They care about your paint as much as you do.
about.differentiators.4.title: Total Convenience
about.differentiators.4.body: We come to your home, office, or apartment. Just provide access to a water source and power outlet, and we handle everything else.
about.approach.title: How we deliver consistent quality
about.approach.step1.title: We bring the right equipment
about.approach.step1.body: Top-notch tools, premium car shampoos, dedicated cleaners, and fresh microfiber for every job. We come fully prepared.
about.approach.step2.title: We use the right products
about.approach.step2.body: Premium car shampoos, dedicated glass cleaners, tar removers, clay bars, and sealant coatings. Never dish soap or diluted bulk chemicals.
about.approach.step3.title: We follow the correct techniques
about.approach.step3.body: Proper wash methods, grit guards, fresh microfiber for each section, and a systematic process from foam pre-wash to final wipe.
about.approach.step4.title: We take our time
about.approach.step4.body: Standard takes 2 hours, Professional 3, Elite 4. Quality takes time. We would rather do fewer cars right than more cars wrong.
about.promise.title: We deliver the best car care in Jakarta, no compromises.
about.promise.bullet1: Premium products that protect your paint, not strip it
about.promise.bullet2: Trained technicians held to the highest standards
about.promise.bullet3: Correct techniques that prevent swirl marks and scratches
about.promise.bullet4: At-home convenience that saves you hours
about.promise.bullet5: We keep working until you are completely satisfied
about.promise.bullet6: Quality you can see and feel every single time

faq.hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our mobile car wash service across Jakarta and surrounding areas.
faq.general.title: General Questions
faq.general.a1: Tap the WhatsApp button, tell us the service you want, your preferred date and time, and your location. We will confirm your booking within 30 minutes.
faq.general.q2: Do I need to provide anything?
faq.general.a2: We just need access to a water source and a power outlet. We bring all the equipment, products, and microfiber towels needed for the job.
faq.general.a3: We serve Jakarta and surrounding areas. We use zone-based scheduling to keep service prompt and on time.
faq.general.q4: Where can you wash my car?
faq.general.a4: We work at houses, townhouses, and locations with access to a water source and power outlet. Covered parking is ideal but not required.
faq.general.q5: How long does each service take?
faq.general.a5: Standard takes approximately 2 hours, Professional approximately 3 hours, and Elite approximately 4 hours.
faq.pricing.title: Pricing & Payment
faq.pricing.a1: We use premium products, the correct equipment, and trained technicians who follow proper techniques on every car. We take our time and keep working until you are satisfied with the result.
faq.pricing.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.pricing.a2: Bank transfer (BCA, Mandiri, BNI, BRI) and e-wallets (GoPay, OVO, DANA). For one-time bookings, you pay after the service is completed. For subscriptions, billing is every 4 months at the start of each cycle.
faq.pricing.a3: For one-time bookings, cancel at least 12 hours ahead and there is no fee. For subscriptions, we require 30 days notice to cancel.
faq.subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
faq.subscriptions.q1: Can I change my subscription tier?
faq.subscriptions.a1: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at the next billing cycle. Just give us 7 days notice before your renewal date.
faq.subscriptions.a2: No. We encourage you to use all your included washes each billing period to keep your car in top condition.
faq.subscriptions.q3: What is the Free Full Detail bonus?
faq.subscriptions.a3: Elite subscribers receive 1 Free Full Detail per year (worth Rp 2,799,000). The Full Detail includes Interior Detailing, Exterior Detailing, Window Detailing, and Tire & Rims Detailing, approximately 8 hours of comprehensive work. Essentials and Plus subscribers do not receive the detailing bonus but can upgrade anytime.
faq.subscriptions.q4: Can I use my subscription for multiple cars?
faq.subscriptions.a4: Yes. You can use your subscription washes across different vehicles. Just let us know when you book each session.
faq.quality.title: Quality & Guarantees
faq.quality.q1: What if I am not satisfied with the result?
faq.quality.a1: We offer a satisfaction guarantee. Contact us within 24 hours and we will come back and redo the service free of charge.
faq.quality.a2: Premium car shampoos, glass cleaners, tar removers, clay bars, and sealant coatings. We never use dish soap, generic all-purpose cleaners, or reused rags. Every car gets fresh microfiber towels.
faq.quality.q3: Will a hand wash scratch my paint?
faq.quality.a3: Not when done correctly. We use proper wash techniques with grit guards, premium microfiber mitts, and the correct equipment. This is the same method professional detailers use worldwide. It is the improper techniques and dirty rags that cause scratches and swirl marks.
faq.serviceDetails.title: Service Details
faq.serviceDetails.q1: What is included in the Standard wash?
faq.serviceDetails.a1: Full foam pre-wash, hand wash with proper technique, interior clean and vacuum, tire polish, and body spot remover.
faq.serviceDetails.q2: What is the difference between Standard and Professional?
faq.serviceDetails.a2: Professional adds glass spot remover for water scale and tar remover for rough, contaminated paint. If your windshield is hazy or your paint feels rough to the touch, Professional is the right choice.
faq.serviceDetails.a3: Everything in Professional plus clay bar decontamination and a premium sealant coating that provides 4 to 8 weeks of hydrophobic protection. Think of it as a mini-detail.
faq.serviceDetails.a4: Not currently. We are focused exclusively on cars to deliver the highest quality of service.
faq.serviceDetails.a5: Cars actually get dirtier in the rain. Acidic rainwater, road spray, and mud make it the best time to wash. We work in covered parking when possible.
faq.detailing.title: Detailing
faq.detailing.q1: What is included in a Full Detail?
faq.detailing.a1: A Full Detail includes all four detailing services: Interior Detailing, Exterior Detailing, Window Detailing, and Tire & Rims Detailing. It takes approximately 8 hours and costs Rp 2,799,000, saving you Rp 257,000 compared to booking each service individually.
faq.detailing.q2: Can I book individual detailing services?
faq.detailing.a2: Yes. You can book Interior Detailing (Rp 1,039,000), Exterior Detailing (Rp 1,039,000), Window Detailing (Rp 689,000), or Tire & Rims Detailing (Rp 289,000) individually.
faq.detailing.q3: How often should I detail my car?
faq.detailing.a3: We recommend a full detail every 3 to 6 months for most drivers. If you park outdoors, drive frequently in dusty or polluted areas, or simply want your car in showroom condition, every 2 to 3 months is ideal.
faq.detailing.a4: Elite subscribers receive 1 Free Full Detail per year (worth Rp 2,799,000). Essentials and Plus subscribers do not receive the detailing bonus but can upgrade to Elite anytime.
oneTime.hero.title: No commitment. No subscription. Just book, and we'll make your car shine.
oneTime.hero.subtitle: Choose the level of care your car needs. Every tier uses premium products, proper technique, and dedicated microfiber, delivered to your doorstep.
oneTime.process.title: Every detail, every time
oneTime.process.step1.title: Foam Pre-Wash
oneTime.process.step1.body: We start with a thick foam layer that loosens dirt, grime, and contaminants without touching the paint. This minimizes the risk of scratching from the very first step.
oneTime.process.step2.title: Two-Bucket Hand Wash
oneTime.process.step2.body: Separate wash and rinse buckets with grit guards. Fresh microfiber mitt for each panel. Premium car shampoo that cleans without stripping wax or sealant. This is the technique that prevents swirl marks.
oneTime.process.step3.title: Interior Deep Clean
oneTime.process.step3.body: Full vacuum of seats, carpets, and boot. Dashboard, console, and trim wipe-down. Door panels and jambs cleaned. Air vents blown out with compressed air.
oneTime.process.step4.title: Wheels, Tires & Engine Bay
oneTime.process.step4.body: Dedicated wheel cleaner for brake dust and grime. Tire sidewalls scrubbed and dressed. Engine bay degreased and detailed, areas most washes skip entirely.
oneTime.differentiators.title: Not your average car wash
oneTime.differentiators.1.title: Premium Products Only
oneTime.differentiators.1.body: Professional-grade chemicals and coatings from trusted brands, not diluted bulk chemicals from the nearest supplier.
oneTime.differentiators.2.title: Two-Bucket Method
oneTime.differentiators.2.body: Separate wash and rinse buckets with grit guards on every job. This prevents swirl marks and paint damage that single-bucket washes cause.
oneTime.differentiators.3.title: Trained Technicians
oneTime.differentiators.3.body: Every technician is trained on proper wash technique, paint decontamination, and sealant application before they touch your car.
oneTime.differentiators.4.title: Total Convenience
oneTime.differentiators.4.body: Home, office, apartment. We come to you across Jakarta and surrounding areas. All equipment and products included. You don't lift a finger.
oneTime.pricing.title: Three tiers. One standard: excellence.
oneTime.pricing.save15Desc: with a quarterly subscription. Elite subscribers also get a
subscriptions.hero.title: Set it and forget it.
subscriptions.hero.subtitle: We'll keep your car pristine on a schedule that works for you. Save 15% vs. one-time pricing. Elite subscribers also get a free Full Detail worth Rp 2.8M every year.

subscriptions.howItWorks.scheduling.body: Pick your preferred days and times. We lock in recurring slots so your car is always taken care of on schedule.
subscriptions.howItWorks.payment.title: Payment
subscriptions.howItWorks.payment.body: Monthly billing via bank transfer or e-wallet (GoPay, OVO, DANA). Simple and automatic.
subscriptions.howItWorks.flexibility.bod: Need to reschedule? Just send us a WhatsApp message at least 24 hours in advance.
subscriptions.howItWorks.cancellation.bo: 30-day notice to cancel. No contracts. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.
subscriptions.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
subscriptions.faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
subscriptions.faq.a2: No. Unused washes do not carry over to the following month. We encourage you to use all your included washes each billing period.
subscriptions.faq.q3: What's included in the Free Full Detail bonus?
subscriptions.faq.a3: Elite subscribers receive 1 Free Full Detail per year (worth Rp 2,799,000). The Full Detail includes Interior Detailing, Exterior Detailing, Window Detailing, and Tire & Rims Detailing. Approximately 8 hours of work. Essentials and Plus subscribers do not receive the detailing bonus.
subscriptions.faq.q4: Can I use Elite for multiple cars?
subscriptions.faq.a4: No. The Elite plan is registered to a single license plate. If you need coverage for additional vehicles, you can subscribe to a separate plan for each car.
subscriptions.faq.a5: No contract. All plans are month-to-month. Cancel anytime with 30 days notice.
subscriptions.faq.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
subscriptions.faq.a6: We accept bank transfer, GoPay, OVO, and DANA. Invoices are sent monthly via WhatsApp.
detailing.hero.title: Deep restoration that goes far beyond a wash.
detailing.hero.subtitle: Professional detailing delivered to your doorstep. Choose individual services or get the Full Detail package for complete restoration.
detailing.services.title: Choose the service your car needs
detailing.fullDetail.title: Full Detail Package
detailing.fullDetail.desc: All four services in one session. Save Rp 257,000 vs. booking individually.
detailing.fullDetail.include1: Interior Detailing: complete cabin deep clean and conditioning
detailing.fullDetail.include2: Exterior Detailing: paint correction, polish, and sealant
detailing.fullDetail.include3: Window Detailing: inside and out with hydrophobic coating
detailing.fullDetail.include4: Tire & Rims Detailing: deep clean, polish, and dressing
detailing.interior.name: Interior Detailing
detailing.interior.desc: A deep restoration of your car's cabin. We clean every surface from headliner to floor mats. Upholstery extraction, dashboard conditioning, leather treatment, vent cleaning, and odour removal. Your interior will look and smell like the day you bought it.
detailing.interior.include1: Deep vacuum of all surfaces including boot
detailing.interior.include4: Dashboard, console, and trim UV-protection treatment
detailing.interior.include5: Air vent and crevice detail with compressed air
detailing.exterior.name: Exterior Detailing
detailing.exterior.desc: Complete paint restoration and protection. We decontaminate, polish, and seal your exterior to remove swirl marks, restore gloss, and protect against UV, rain, and road grime. Your paint will look deep and glossy with a hydrophobic finish.
detailing.exterior.include1: Full foam pre-wash and decontamination wash
detailing.exterior.include2: Clay bar treatment to remove bonded contaminants
detailing.exterior.include3: Machine polish to remove swirl marks and light scratches
detailing.exterior.include6: Door jamb and panel gap cleaning
detailing.window.name: Window Detailing
detailing.window.desc: Crystal-clear windows inside and out. We remove water scale, mineral deposits, and film buildup that regular cleaning misses. Finished with a hydrophobic coating that repels rain for weeks.
detailing.window.include1: Interior glass deep clean (all windows and mirrors)
detailing.window.include2: Exterior water scale and mineral deposit removal
detailing.tireRims.name: Tire & Rims Detailing
detailing.tireRims.desc: Deep cleaning and restoration for your wheels. We remove brake dust, road tar, and grime from rims, clean tire sidewalls, and apply a lasting dressing that protects and restores the deep black finish.
detailing.tireRims.include1: Brake dust and iron fallout removal
detailing.why.title: Detailing done properly, every single time
detailing.why.1.title: Paint-Safe Process
detailing.why.1.body: Every step is designed to protect your paint, not damage it. We decontaminate before polishing, and seal after correcting. No shortcuts, no skipped steps.
detailing.why.2.title: Premium Products Only
detailing.why.2.body: We use trusted detailing brands for every product. From clay bars to sealant coatings, everything is selected for performance and paint safety.
detailing.why.3.title: Trained Detailing Specialists
detailing.why.3.body: Our detailers are trained specifically in paint correction, interior restoration, and coating application. They know how to handle every surface and material in your car.
detailing.why.4.title: Visible, Lasting Results
detailing.why.4.body: You will see and feel the difference immediately. Deep gloss, hydrophobic finish, restored interiors. Results that last weeks, not days.
detailing.subscriberBonus.title: Get Full Detailing for Free
detailing.subscriberBonus.body: Elite subscribers get 1 free Full Detail per year (worth Rp 2,799,000) on top of your regular washes. Subscribe to Elite to unlock this bonus.
